goal: Separate Local Engine and LLM responsibilities so local rules create evidence and LLMs enrich explanation, ranking, and summaries.

steps.name: local-evidence-packet
steps.summary: Added Local Evidence Packet generation from local RF signatures, taxonomy classification, diagnostic tests, missing info, and similar cases; chat LLM context now receives this packet. Verified with typecheck, harness policy check, diff check, and evidence packet smoke.

steps.name: hybrid-hypothesis-schema
steps.summary: Added HybridHypothesisCandidate schema, evidence-id validation, local packet-to-hypothesis mapping, chat-time hypothesis refresh for RF intent, and hypothesis smoke coverage.

steps.name: llm-summary-next-steps
steps.summary: Added evidence-grounded hybrid summary schema and local deterministic summary generation. Next steps now require text, rationale, evidence ids/labels, and messageId; UI source metadata and message jump support are preserved. Verified with summary smoke and typecheck.

steps.name: signature-normalization-synonyms
steps.summary: Added no-dependency Korean/English RF synonym extraction for sensitivity drop, shield can, contact force/pressure, reassembly, conducted, and OTA terms; similarity value normalization now keeps synonym matches compatible with existing signature keys. Verified with signature synonym smoke and typecheck.

steps.name: import-reason-enrichment
steps.summary: Added deterministic ImportStatusDecision shape, local evidence packet retention, importFacts, and attachment-backed source facts while preserving original-view modal and duplicate matching. Verified with import reason-shape smoke and build.

steps.name: attachment-evidence-linking
steps.summary: Added attachment-derived LocalEvidenceItem entries for tables, images, URLs, and files; chat/import attachments carry concise evidence trace metadata for detail views and future OCR/LLM handoff. Verified with attachment evidence smoke, existing evidence/hypothesis smokes, typecheck, Vite build, and server esbuild.
